leadText: Air Cutter (Japanese: エアカッター Air Cutter) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation III. It is TM040 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations III-V 1.2 Generation VI onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations III-V [ edit | edit source ] Air Cutter deals damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. It hits both opponents in a Double Battle and all opposing adjacent Pokémon in Triple Battles . Air Cutter's odds of landing critical hits is calculated for each hit opponent individually. Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Air Cutter's power changed from 55 to 60. In Horde Encounters , it will target all opponents. Air Cutter will also knock down Berries growing on Berry trees found in the background of battles . If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%. Air Cutter is a wind move . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Air Cutter's PP has been reduced to 15, and like all other moves in Pokémon Legends: Arceus , it can only hit one target. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 15 Agile Strong Power 60 45 75 Accuracy 95% 95% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Crit. stage 1 1 2 ? ? ? ? sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD Hacks with razorlike wind. High critical-hit ratio. FR LG The foe is hit with razor-like wind. It has a high critical-hit ratio. D P Pt HG SS PBR The user launches razorlike wind to slash the foe. It has a high critical-hit ratio. B W B2 W2 The user launches razor-like wind to slash the opposing team. Critical hits land more easily. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E The user launches razor-like wind to slash the opposing Pokémon. Critical hits land more easily. Sw Sh BD SP The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. Critical hits land more easily. LA The user launches razor-like wind to slash the target. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. S V The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. It has a high critical-hit rate. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる きゅうしょに あたりやすい MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It has a high critical-hit rate.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Air Cutter is the only damage-dealing Flying-type move that cannot hit non-adjacent foes in Triple Battles . Air Cutter is one of three moves that can be used to collect Berries from the Berry trees appearing behind foes in wild battles, the others being Twister and Blizzard .
